summary: Dhirendra Kumar, Founder & CEO of Value Research, joins me on the This or That podcast to share the real truths of wealth creation in India. We discuss what most investors get wrong, how to simplify your portfolio, and how to build lasting wealth with just discipline, SIPs, and the right mindset.

tool.label: Asset Allocator
tool.reason: This episode is really about your mix. Put in your numbers and see the equity, debt, gold and international split that actually fits you.

disclaimer: This content is for educational purposes only. It is not investment advice. Please consult a certified financial advisor before making investment decisions. Past performance is not indicative of future returns.
